name: Sicilian Sauce for Pizza (Tdn)
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, heat the olive oil.
2. Add onion, basil, and oregano. Cook until the onion softens slightly, stirring occasionally for about 6 minutes.
3. Mix in garlic and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Add tomato paste and cook for 3 minutes, stirring often.
5. Add crushed tomatoes and bring to a simmer. Crush tomatoes with the back of a spoon.
6. Simmer until the sauce is very thick, about 45 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Sauce can be prepared ahead. Cover and refrigerate up to 1 week or freeze for up to 1 month. Makes about 2 1/2 cups.
When ready to make pizza, top with your favorite items and bake at 350 degrees for about 15 minutes or until the crust is lightly browned and sauce is bubbly. Watch carefully during the last 5 minutes to ensure the crust does not burn.
